06 — Risk assessment

Construction risk assessment

L x S = Risk score. Likelihood: Remote=1, Occasional=2, Probable=3. Severity: Negligible=1 to Catastrophic=5.

08 — Generate

Review & generate

Check the summary, preview the document, then download as PDF.

Download RAMS document

Generates and downloads the complete RAMS as a PDF including all sections, H&S policy, system diagrams, COSHH, HAVS and noise assessments.

RAMS PDF and project file (.json) downloaded. Keep the .json file to amend this RAMS later.
